decision.summary: No new action: the bearish thesis remains intact, but the only fresh daily candidate left is the late 74k dip, which is too stretched to force.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and Binance spot is 75044.17. The weekly 72k dip remains active as the structural bearish expression, while the old 77k reach momentum leg is still open but correctly discarded for slot purposes at just 4.5%. The earlier daily 75k dip has already played out and is no longer part of the open book, so the nearest new downside candidate would be the 74k dip at about 29%. That is below the preferred tradable band and, more importantly, it now requires a fresh second leg lower late in the UTC session after much of the downside move has already happened. The playbook explicitly warns against forcing that kind of late daily extension. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone, and there is no cleaner bullish continuation setup either. The correct action is to hold the weekly bearish thesis and avoid chasing a low-quality late daily.
